title: Craftable Horse Armor (like leather)
description: Makes all Horse Armors craftable like the leather one
body:
### Craftable Horse Armor Mod
The Craftable Horse Armor Mod brings a much-requested feature to Minecraft: crafting recipes for horse armor! With this mod, you can finally craft iron, gold, and diamond horse armor using materials you already know and love.

## Features:
- Adds crafting recipes for all types of horse armor: Leather, Iron, Gold, and Diamond.
- Recipes are balanced and fit naturally into the game's progression.
- Created with MCreator, a powerful mod-making tool for easy and fast mod development.

## Versions:
Forge: 1.18.2; 1.19.2; 1.20.1
Fabric: 1.20.1

If you've ever wished you could craft horse armor instead of relying on dungeon loot, this mod is the perfect solution. Equip your trusty steed in style!

Download the Craftable Horse Armor Mod and make your adventures even more epic!
